data.name: KoboldKare
data.detailed_description:
KoboldKare is a multiplayer farming simulator, but instead of making produce you're making naked Kobolds! It's an FPS where there is bhopping, surfing, trimping, and also sex.

Grow your farm by making Kobolds, doing services, and selling product. Improve your farm, buy lewd equipment, and interact with the town denizens.

KoboldKare is a DRM-free made for Windows, Mac, and Linux computers with the following features:
  • A Quake/CS:S movement inspired movement system. Bunnyhop and trimp off of rocks for maximum height, speed-forage the forest with record time.
  • A chemical system that lets you mix basic chems and feed them to Kobolds.
  • Grow Kobolds with random stats, parts, and proportions!
  • You can sell Kobolds, eggs, and produce for cash!
  • Play with an extremely detailed GPU-powered sex penetration system with knot forces, procedural bulging, deformations...
  • Buy machines, toys, and resources from the City.
  • Working multiplayer! Manage a farm with your friends, or have sex with 8-16 other players online!

data.supported_languages: 英文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 匈牙利文, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 希臘文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: AMD 5 2500/Intel i5-7200
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen 7 2700X/Intel i7-8700K
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS Catalina 10.15.4
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHZ Dual Core Intel i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS Catalina 10.15.4
  • 處理器: 3.6 GHZ Quad Core Intel i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 680 Mac Edition
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04.4 LTS
  • 處理器: AMD 5 2500/Intel i5-7200
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OS must support Vulkan, see:
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Arch Linux
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen 7 2700X/Intel i7-8700K
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OS must support Vulkan, see:
